title: bromus villosus var. rigidus
intro: Bromus villosus var. rigidus, also known as hairy chess or rigid brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bromus villosus var. rigidus include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal purposes, and it is also used in traditional remedies for various health conditions.
